pack.endpoemfabric.chinese_end_poem.name: Chinese End Poem
endpoemfabric.msg.cooldown: Please wait %s seconds before using this.
endpoemfabric.msg.replayed_all: Replayed the End Poem for %s players.
endpoemfabric.msg.replayed_none: No eligible players to replay the End Poem for.
text.autoconfig.endpoemfabric.title: Endpoem Settings
text.autoconfig.endpoemfabric.option.acc: When disabled, all End Poem packets are blocked locally on this client. This also blocks the normal vanilla End Poem.
text.autoconfig.endpoemfabric.option.use: When enabled, the client reads End Poem text from config/endpoemfabric/end.txt. Edit the file, then reopen the End Poem to apply it.
text.autoconfig.endpoemfabric.option.edi: Open the built-in editor or the custom End Poem text file.
text.endpoemfabric.editor.title: Custom End Poem
text.endpoemfabric.editor.plain_text.des: Editable: § is shown as plain text.
text.endpoemfabric.editor.preview_read_o: Preview mode is read-only. Legacy § formatting is applied.
